final_response:
Here's the current crontab for root:

```
# m h dom mon dow command
0 * * * * /usr/bin/logrotate /etc/logrotate.conf
30 2 * * * /usr/local/bin/backup.sh
```

This crontab has two scheduled jobs:
1. **`0 * * * * /usr/bin/logrotate /etc/logrotate.conf`** - Runs logrotate at the top of every hour (00 minutes)
2. **`30 2 * * * /usr/local/bin/backup.sh`** - Runs the backup script at 2:30 AM every day
